verse_text: So at that time, when all the peoples heard the sound of the trumpet, the pipe, the harp, the four-stringed instrument, the psaltery, the symphony, and every kind of music, all the peoples, tribes, and languages fell down and worshipped the golden image King Nebuchadnezzar set up.

links.context: This verse describes a pagan religious procession such as someone like Daniel would daily witness (see [[DAN.3:1]]-7).
